---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Emotion-Lens
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Use input '...'
2. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected the model to predict or the API to return.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (wrong prediction, error, crash, etc.).

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.

## Environment
- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Python Version:** (e.g., 3.10)
- **Deployment:** (e.g., local, Streamlit Cloud, Hugging Face)
- **Model Used:** (e.g., fer2013, custom)
- **Input Type:** (e.g., image file, webcam, API call)

## Additional Context
- Training data used (if re-training):
- API endpoint called (if applicable):
- Any error traceback:
